questions.question: What visible component matches this description: the central mythological male figure?
questions.rgb_answer: The central mythological male figure is the one standing upright in the middle of the façade, holding what appears to be a spear or staff. He is surrounded by other sculptural elements and is part of a larger group of figures that are integral to the design of the building's central archway. This figure is likely to represent a deity or a significant historical or mythological character, given the grandeur and prominence of his position within the architectural composition.
